mapper.sql: select id, customer_id, inventory_id, order_no, inventory_item_id, asset_id, print_task_id, print_task_no, print_task_item_id, print_log_id, del_flag, del_by, del_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from sb_asset_inventory_item_print
mapper.select: where inventory_item_id = #{inventoryItemId} and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId} and (del_flag = 0 or del_flag is null) order by create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into sb_asset_inventory_item_print (id, customer_id, inventory_id, order_no, inventory_item_id, asset_id, print_task_id, print_task_no, print_task_item_id, print_log_id, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{inventoryId}, #{orderNo}, #{inventoryItemId}, #{assetId}, #{printTaskId}, #{printTaskNo}, #{printTaskItemId}, #{printLogId}, 0, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update sb_asset_inventory_item_print set del_flag = 1, del_by = #{delBy}, del_time = now(), update_by = #{delBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and customer_id = #{scopedTenantId}
